allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add input label card badge table dialog form select switch calendar tabs separator avatar skeleton --yes)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host 'Todos los procesos node terminados'")
